description: wyrzuc z wersji telefonicznej add objects, pozostaw jedynie maly bar na dole gdzie moge dodaj zdjecie do zaznaczonego wczeniusje obiektu - jesli jestem PM, a jesli TECH moge tylko zaznaczac checkbox color by status - zadnych plusow czy wysuwania menu do gory - tylko podglad jako TECH
title: wyrzuc z wersji telefonicznej add objects, pozostaw jedynie maly bar na dole gdzie moge dodaj zdjeci

criteria.description: Mobile view does not contain any '+' buttons or 'Add Object' menus.
criteria.how_to_verify: Visual inspection of `client/src/pages/home.tsx` and `client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx` for conditional rendering based on `isMobile`.

criteria.description: For PM role on mobile, `MobileBottomBar` renders a button to add photos to a selected object.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check `MobileBottomBar.tsx` for `role === 'admin'` or `'manager'` logic rendering `ObjectPhotoGallery` or a direct upload trigger.

criteria.description: For TECH role on mobile, `MobileBottomBar` renders only a checkbox/switch for 'Color by status'.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check `MobileBottomBar.tsx` for `role === 'technician'` logic rendering the `Checkbox` for status colors.

criteria.description: Mobile Bottom Bar does not expand/slide upwards.
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify `MobileBottomBar.tsx` does not use `Drawer` or height-expanding animations/states.

criteria.description: Technicians cannot drag or resize objects on mobile.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check `ObjectRenderer.tsx` for `disableDragging` and `enableResizing={false}` props on the `Rnd` component when user is a technician and on mobile.
